stemHtml: For PBN operations, what is true regarding fly-by turns and fly-over turns?

options.a: Fly-by waypoints are used when the aircraft must first fly over the waypoint before starting a turn.
options.b: Fly-by and fly-over waypoints are compatible with both RNAV and RNP flight tracks.
options.c: The fly-by turn can be used in RNP flight tracks but fly-over turns are excluded.
options.d: Pilots can change a route database waypoint type from a fly-by to a fly-over.
